creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
It needs openssl 1.0.2 and FreeBSD 10 only has 1.0.1.  This is only temporary.  The next step is to let ports use ports openssl by default instead of the base system openssl.

If you want you could limit the change to just FreeBSD 10 using something like this:

OPTIONS_DEFAULT_FreeBSD_10=BUNDLED_SSL
OPTIONS_DEFAULT=${OPTIONS_DEFAULT_${OPSYS}_${OSREL:R}}
